en: Sunday, oh oh oh oh oh oh
I was caught in the middle of a railroad track
I looked around and I knew there was no turning back
ko: 지하에서 돌아갈 수 없다는 걸 알았지

en: My mind raced and I thought what could I do
ko: 머릿속이 복잡해지고, 나는 무엇을 할 수 있을까 생각했어

en: And I knew there was no help, no help from you
ko: 그리고 너에게서 도움은 없다는 걸 알았어
